name: vsql_statistics
description: Statistical aggregate functions for data scientists. Provides 43 functions across 10 families: IQR and quartiles (Q1, Q3, median, outlier fences), two-sample t-test (pooled variance, p-values, critical values), mode (all modes, min, max), skewness (moment-based and Pearson), one-sample z-test, kurtosis (population and excess), covariance (population and sample), robust and ratio means (trimmed, Winsorized, geometric, harmonic), chi-squared (goodness of fit and test of independence), and one-way ANOVA (F-statistic, p-value, sum of squares, mean squares, degrees of freedom).
author: Ronald Bradford
